message:
feat(lipgloss): Add output backend abstraction for WASM support

- Create backend.rs with OutputBackend trait for multi-target rendering
- Implement AnsiBackend for terminal ANSI escape code output
- Implement PlainBackend for plain text output (default for WASM)
- Add DefaultBackend type alias with cfg-based platform selection
- Add Debug impl for ThemeContext (fixes compile error)
- Update lib.rs to export backend types in module and prelude

Closes: charmed_rust-ykf, charmed_rust-ejn
Part of: charmed_rust-64r (WASM Support Epic)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
